subcodes.first_line: O kind friend! Though there be shortcomings in the penning of this letter, such laxity ariseth from the press of numerous occupations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان در تحریر نامه هر چند قصور حاصل ولی این فتور از کثرت مشاغل موفور
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat]
